seo.title: CreativeBro | Jasa Pembuatan Website & Aplikasi Mobile Premium
seo.description: CreativeBro adalah studio kreatif yang fokus membangun website (React, Laravel) dan aplikasi mobile (Flutter) yang cepat, responsif, dan siap meroketkan bisnis lu.
seo.keywords: jasa pembuatan website, bikin aplikasi android, flutter jakarta, react developer indonesia, creativebro, web portofolio, laravel developer

hero.subheadline: CreativeBro adalah tempat di mana baris kode React, Laravel, dan Flutter disulap menjadi produk digital yang mahal, responsif, dan siap meroketkan bisnis lu.

services.title: APA YANG BISA KAMI BANTU?
services.web_desc: Bikin landing page, web portofolio, sampai sistem custom yang cepat dan SEO-friendly pake React, Tailwind, dan Laravel.
services.mobile_title: Jasa Buat Aplikasi Flutter Android & iOS
services.mobile_desc: Pengembangan aplikasi Android dan iOS yang smooth, native-look, dan siap rilis ke Play Store pake Flutter.
services.backend_desc: Arsitektur database yang solid, aman, dan integrasi API yang seamless menggunakan MySQL, Firebase, atau Supabase.

portfolio.title: KUMPULAN PROYEK KAMI
portfolio.subtitle: Kumpulan proyek sukses yang kami bangun dengan dedikasi penuh.

contact.headline:
PUNYA IDE PROYEK
YANG MAU DIEKSEKUSI?
contact.subheadline: Konsultasikan kebutuhan aplikasi atau website bisnis lu secara gratis. Klik tombol di bawah dan mari kita obrolin langsung!

whatsapp.cta: Ingin berkonsultasi untuk rencana pembuatan website Anda? Tekan tombol Call to Action di kiri bawah untuk terhubung dengan tim konsultan kami.

seo.title: CreativeBro | Premium Web & Mobile App Development Services
seo.description: CreativeBro is a creative studio focused on building fast, responsive, and high-converting websites (React, Laravel) and mobile apps (Flutter).
seo.keywords: web development services, mobile app development, flutter developer, react developer, creativebro portfolio, custom software development

hero.subheadline: CreativeBro is where lines of React, Laravel, and Flutter code are crafted into premium, responsive digital products ready to scale your business.

services.title: HOW CAN WE HELP YOU?
services.web_desc: Building landing pages, portfolio websites, and high-speed, SEO-friendly custom systems using React, Tailwind, and Laravel.
services.mobile_title: Flutter Android & iOS Mobile App Development
services.mobile_desc: Developing smooth, native-looking Android and iOS applications ready for Play Store deployment using Flutter.
services.backend_desc: Solid and secure database architecture with seamless API integration using MySQL, Firebase, or Supabase.

portfolio.title: SELECTED WORK
portfolio.subtitle: A collection of successful projects built with absolute dedication.

contact.headline:

whatsapp.cta: Want to consult about your website development plan? Press the Call to Action button on the bottom left to connect with our consulting team.
